norm_1.content: No one should tell others how to behave in the cafe.
norm_1.subject: no one
norm_1.object: others how to behave in the cafe

norm_2.content: Individuals should not be judged for their choices as long as they don't harm others.
norm_2.subject: individuals
norm_2.object: for their choices as long as they don't harm others

norm_3.content: Rules should only be enforced when there is direct harm to others.
norm_3.subject: rules
norm_3.object: when there is direct harm to others

norm_4.content: People should not interrupt others' conversations or activities.
norm_4.subject: people

norm_5.content: Patrons should not impose their preferences on shared spaces.
norm_5.subject: patrons
